purpose: Approved AR2-20/AR2-21 tie-aware evidence remediation without overwriting the prior canonical run

ranking_policy.selection: fixed candidate declaration order only for exact score ties
ranking_policy.stability: average ranks from archived candidate scores with standard tie-corrected Kendall's W

planned_controls: within-dataset Cliff's delta provenance and matched-pairs rank-biserial effect size
Propositions 1-3 finite-sample and Proposition 6 population identity verification
verification: all expected row counts and all three duplicate-group overlap checks PASS
note: Accepted after candidate-score, tie, ordinal-reconciliation, 200-permutation, effect-size, and proposition checks. Superseded evidence remains immutable provenance.
